name: Akari Therapeutics Plc
business: Akari Therapeutics Plc is an oncology company developing next-generation antibody-drug conjugates (ADCs) built around a novel payload, PH1, which targets RNA splicing to kill cancer cells and activate the immune system. Its lead candidate, AKTX-101, targets the Trop-2 receptor and is in preclinical development for solid tumors, with a goal to initiate Phase 1 trials by late 2026/early 2027. The company also has an earlier-stage program, AKTX-102, targeting CEACAM5.

exposures.sentence: We are an oncology company developing next-generation antibody-drug conjugates ( ADCs ) built around novel, proprietary payloads utilizing powerful biology to attack cancer.

catalysts.event: Initiation of GMP manufacturing activities for AKTX-101
catalysts.sentence: In December 2025, we initiated GMP manufacturing activities for AKTX-101 and selected WuXi Biologics/XDC as our partner for these key parts of IND enabling work and product supply for future clinical trials.

catalysts.event: Target start of First-In-Human Phase 1 trial for AKTX-101
catalysts.sentence: The Company is advancing its lead asset AKTX-101 towards clinical trials and has initiated IND enabling studies for AKTX-101 with a goal of starting its First-In-Human Phase 1 trial by late 2026/early 2027.
